title: The ONLY 6 Skills You Need to 10x Your Claude Projects
summary: Austin Marchese outlines six Claude skills for improving project results: web scraping for data discovery, ingest-source for knowledge base capture, improve-system for iterative refinement, ask-the-board for advisor consultation, internal-focus-group for testing, and compound engineering for shipping. The framework is demonstrated through building a fitness trainer project.
